title: geography — settings
description: Workspace-facing geography preferences. Two groups: workspace defaults + per-user preferences. These are PREFERENCES only — reference-catalog rows themselves are global.

groups.label: Region defaults
groups.description: Workspace-wide defaults for country, currency, timezone, and language.

fields.name: default_country_code
fields.label: Default country
fields.helpText: Used as pre-selected value on signup + form dropdowns.

fields.name: default_currency_code
fields.label: Default currency
fields.helpText: Used for pricing display when the workspace doesn't specify a currency per row.

fields.name: default_timezone
fields.label: Default timezone
fields.helpText: IANA timezone name. Used for date rendering.

fields.name: default_geography_language_code
fields.label: Default reference language
fields.helpText: Distinct from the workspace's active locale (see Languages settings). Used for content-authoring hints.
